name: AVM Advogados
description: AVM Advogados was founded by Antonio Vicente Marques in 2003. The firm originally began assisting clients as a full-service law firm operating through its various offices in Africa and Europe with an integrated team of more than 40 lawyers. AVM Advogados has grown from a Luanda-based law firm into a truly international practice. AVM is a full-service law firm with market leading strengths in energy, financial services and EPCs and PPPs projects and related legal assistance. Awards and nominations
2016 – Legal 500 – Leading Firm
**AVM** was ranked as one of the top law firms in several practice areas: **Banking and Finance, Corporate and M &A, Employment, Energy and Environment, Shipping and Transport**.
2026 - Leaders League
2025 - Legal 500
2026 - Chambers & Partners - Global Guide
**Chambers and Partners once again recognises AVM Advogados in the Global Guide 2026**
We are very pleased with the distinction of AVM Advogados, in the Global Guide 2026 ranking by the renowned international directory **Chambers and Partners** in Band 2 in the **General Business Law (Angola)** category and in Band 4 in the **General Business Law: International Firms (Expertise Based Abroad)** category.
‘ _The response from AVM Advogados is always timely and appropriate and in close coordination with our team._ ’ Client Feedback
António Vicente Marques, Managing Partner, is also highlighted in Band 1 in the **General Business Law (Angola)** category.
António Vicente Marques was also recognised in the **Corporate/M &A (Portugal – expertise abroad)** category.
‘ _**António Vicente Marques** is very experienced and quickly understands the nature of our requests. His approach always has our commercial interests in mind._’ – **Client Feedback**
‘António Vicente Marques is the right person to work with for international companies. He has great experience.’ – **Client Feedback**
Click [here](https://chambers.com/law-firm/avm-advogados-global-2:216748) to view the ranking.
2024 - Legal 500
**AVM ranked as TOP TIER FIRM by Legal 500 – 2024 Edition.**
[AVM Advogados](https://www.linkedin.com/company/avm-advogados/) was distinguished in **TIER 1** , by the Legal 500, in the 2024 edition, in the ** _LOCAL LAW FIRM_** category in Angola.
In the individual rankings, [António Vicente Marques](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ant%C3%B3nio-vicente-marques-01b202168?miniProfileUrn=urn%3Ali%3Afs_miniProfile%3AACoAACflpZcBZmGDm9i1DcpvYeRGtgxbvlZlVXc&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Ad_flagship3_search_srp_all%3BKdXCjsxfTSWUcufYt8fOcQ%3D%3D), Founding Partner, was highlighted in this edition.
All the information available [here](https://www.legal500.com/firms/14771-avm/57295-luanda-angola/#section-107335).
2023 - Legal 500
**AVM ranked as TOP TIER FIRM by Legal 500 – 2023 Edition.**
[AVM Advogados](https://www.linkedin.com/company/avm-advogados/) was distinguished in TIER 1, by the Legal 500, in the 2023 edition, in the _LOCAL FIRM_ category in Angola.
In the individual rankings, [António Vicente Marques](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ant%C3%B3nio-vicente-marques-01b202168?miniProfileUrn=urn%3Ali%3Afs_miniProfile%3AACoAACflpZcBZmGDm9i1DcpvYeRGtgxbvlZlVXc&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Ad_flagship3_search_srp_all%3BKdXCjsxfTSWUcufYt8fOcQ%3D%3D), Founding Partner, [Sandra Teixeira da Silva](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAADnKejEBHeelENeznK0gltbMtBR9i12MF2c), Partner, and [Hélder Fernandes Carrazedo](https://www.linkedin.com/in/h%C3%A9lder-carrazedo-1b429b47?miniProfileUrn=urn%3Ali%3Afs_miniProfile%3AACoAAAnUrFgBFNKM6VGR6lwfYZY3R8xs6sc4SO4&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Ad_flagship3_search_srp_all%3BwiRbfi%2FxQjir8Rv3ym%2BbZw%3D%3D), Senior Associate, were highlighted in this edition.
All the information available here: [https://www.legal500.com/firms/14771-avm/57295-luanda-angola?layout=emea&token=bed7323a0c6b0a859dc087fd319ee9d0](https://www.legal500.com/firms/14771-avm/57295-luanda-angola?layout=emea&token=bed7323a0c6b0a859dc087fd319ee9d0)
2023 - Chambers & Partners - Global Guide
**Chambers and Partners distinguishes AVM Advogados in the Global Guide 2023 ranking.**
We are very pleased with the distinction of AVM Advogados, in the Global Guide 2023 ranking by the renowned **_Chambers and Partners_** in Band 2 in the category of General Business Law Firm in Angola.
António Vicente Marques, Managing Partner is highlighted, in Band 1, as Leading Lawyer and local counsel.
_"**António Vicente Marques** is well placed to act on a broad range of matters including banking, corporate and telecommunications issues, as well as contentious mandates. He enjoys a solid reputation in the market for his longstanding expertise and depth of knowledge in Angola."– **Client Feedback**_
AVM was also distinguished in Band 4 as General Business Law: International Firms (Expertise Abroad), in Angola, with emphasis in corporate / M&A area.
Following this link to access da ranking: <https://chambers.com/legal-rankings/general-business-law-angola-2:852:15:1>
2022 - Africa Top 50
**AVM Advogados** was ranked among the **top 50 firms** by  _Law.com International_.
2022 - Legal 500
**AVM ranked as Top Tier Firm by Legal 500 – 2022 Edition**
AVM was distinguished in Tier 1, by the Legal 500, in the 2022 edition, in the Local Firm category in Angola.
In the individual rankings, Sandra Teixeira da Silva, Partner, and Hélder Fernandes Carrazedo, Senio Associate were highlighted in this edition
All the information available here: <https://www.legal500.com/firms/14771-avm/57295-luanda-angola/#section-107335>
2022 - Chambers & Partners - Global Guide
AVM Advogados was recognized by Chambers and Partners, in the Global Guide 2022, in Band 2, as General Business Law Firm, in Angola.
António Vicente Marques, Managing Partner is highlighted, in Band 1, as local counsel.
_António Vicente Marques is well placed to act on a broad range of matters including banking, corporate and telecommunications issues, as well as contentious mandates. He enjoys a solid reputation in the market for his longstanding expertise and depth of knowledge in Angola._
_"António Vicente Marques is very experienced in Angola." –**Client Feedback**_
AVM was also distinguished in Band 4 as General Business Law: International Firms (Expertise Abroad), in Angola. Tiago Pereira Monteiro, Senior Associate, is mentioned as a notable practitioner.
2021 - Legal 500 - Local Firm
AVM Advogados was distinguished in Tier 1, by Legal 500, in the 2021 edition, in the Local Firm category.
_Clients appreciate that the firm "**has a solid team with a good understanding of Angolan laws and business procedures.** "_
_Other interviewees point to the group's "**in-depth expertise** " in regard to local laws._
_[António Vicente Marques](https://chambers.com/lawyer/antonio-vicente-marques-global-2:571629) is well placed to act on a broad range of matters including banking, corporate and telecommunications issues. Peers appreciate that he is "**very good, competent and easy to work with.** " A client noted his long-standing expertise, stating: "**He has a depth of knowledge of the evolution of the law, which is extremely helpful.** "_
2021 - Africa Top 50
**AVM Advogados** was ranked among the **top 50 firms** by _Law.com International_.
2020 – Legal 500 – Local Firm
**HPF Advogados** was distinguished in Band 3 by the Legal 500 – 2020 Edition as Local Firm in Mozambique.
_At HPF Advogados - AVM Legal Network Member, managing partner Hélder Paulo Frechaut advises across a broad spectrum of legal areas, including corporate, commercial, banking, foreign investment and employment. Gisela Teresa Chunguane is a key contact at the senior associate level. –_** _Legal 500_**
‘ _The team is very helpful and capable. They will always take the extra step in order to assist you._ ‘ –  _**Client Feedback**_
‘ _Hélder Paulo Frechaut is professional and highly regarded by our company._ ‘  _**– Client Feedback**_
2019 – Legal 500 – Leading Firm
AVM was ranked, in Band 2, as a  _Leading Firm._
"_Foreign investment and oil and gas projects are mainstays at AVM, which grew its banking and finance practice through its involvement in several large-scale financing and capital markets transactions. Managing partner António Vicente Marques heads the team in Luanda, which works closely with colleagues in the firm's Lisbon office, including Sandra Teixeira da Silva._ " - **Legal 500**
2019 – Chambers & Partners – Top Leading Firm
Recently, **Chambers & Partners**published their results for 2019, with AVM Advogados being distinguished, once again, as a **TOP ranked Leading Firm** by the International directory in Band 2 in the category of General Business Law in Angola and Local Firm.
“ _The team is well known for handling corporate, labour, finance and tax issues. Its clients emanate from the construction and energy sectors and the firm is also accustomed to dealing with the marketing of pharmaceuticals. Clients are pleased with the firm's responsiveness and report that the team is "always available. They show professionalism and competence." Interviewees are also quick to point to the firm's "complete knowledge of Angolan law_." - **Chambers and Partners**
“** _Antonio Vicente Marques_** _as a "strategist" whose skills are useful for "very complex matters." He is singled out for his "Angolan experience; you feel it through his know-how and network." He focuses his practice on labour, finance, foreign investment and tax matters._ ”**Chambers and Partners**
2018 – Chambers & Partners – Leading Individual
AVM was also ranked as Leading Individual, distinguishing António Vicente Marques, Founding Partner of AVM, in the area of General Business Law Angola.
2018 – Chambers & Partners – Leading Firm
AVM was ranked as a leading firm in the area of General Business Law Angola.
2017 – Chambers & Partners – Leading Firm
AVM was ranked as a leading law firm in the area of Business law in the 2017 Directory of Chambers and Partners Global.
AVM was also ranked highly in the areas of corporate/M&A, Employment and Banking and Finance.
2017 – Legal 500 – Leading Firm
AVM Advogados was classified, in Band 2, among the best law firms in the areas of Corporate and Labor.
